attacking_style: Operates in early-to-mid race breakaways rather than late aggressive moves. Lacks punch to respond when pace intensifies on climbs, more suited to steady tempo efforts.
team_tactics: Insufficient data to identify clear team setup patterns. Appears to operate opportunistically in breakaway scenarios without visible dedicated team support in these observations.
terrain_preference: Best suited to flatter breakaway scenarios or controlled tempo efforts. Exposed on sustained climbs where pace accelerates, particularly in selective mountain stages.
vulnerability: Cannot sustain intensified climbing pace when stronger riders attack. Dropped from reduced groups on climbs when tempo increases, suggesting threshold/VO2max limitations on gradients.
key_patterns: Active in breakaways but struggles when climbs thin out the group (2 observations)
Positioned well initially but fades when pace intensifies rather than at constant tempo (2 observations)
Makes chase groups but cannot match final accelerations from elite climbers (2 observations)
form_trajectory: negative: Dropped from breakaway in June after limiting losses in March, suggesting declining climbing capacity through early 2022 season
